case_title: CCSF / TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. TETYANA SULIMOVA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT TETYANA SULIMOVA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
